name: National Geographic Wildlife Documentary
description: Professional broadcast wildlife cinematography. Subject-focused with shallow depth of field, warm color grading, isolated subjects against clean backgrounds, cinematic elegance.

visual_attributes.texture: Fine detail on subject, soft background, cinematic bokeh
visual_attributes.camera_feel: Professional cinema, shallow depth of field, focal-length compression

image_gen_workflow.prompt_template: [creature/subject] underwater, National Geographic documentary photography style, professional wildlife cinematography, shallow depth of field, subject sharp and detailed, soft blurred background, warm color grading, broadcast quality, cinematic elegance

video_gen_workflow.motion_prompt_template: slow subtle movement of [creature], shallow depth of field maintained, subject in sharp focus, elegant camera work, broadcast wildlife cinematography, dramatic lighting

remotion_role: Minimal - this style showcases subjects, not for text/data overlay
